content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Broad weakness today with Nifty -1.06%, IT crashing -4.66%, VIX up +3.5% to 19.24. Book is 68% deployed and already sitting on unrealized loss. Priority is position management — trail SLs on winners, respect SLs on losers, no fresh adds into a weak tape with a rate-sensitive financial cluster already in the book.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Down 6.3% but thesis intact — Q4 beat, +35% PAT YoY, GNPA improved. SL at 75 sits just below today's low (75.75) and is the structural line. Current SL = stored SL, no-op MODIFY avoided. If 75 breaks, the stop does its job. Not adding."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1007.15,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +4.4%, should trail SL. However current stored SL is already 1007.15 which is above entry 984 — already at breakeven+. No-op MODIFY would be wasted. Converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Hedge position, -1.1%, SL 119 (~3.6% below CMP) is appropriate for a low-vol hedge. Gold consolidating but Fed/geopolitical optionality intact. No change warranted."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1412.94,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Near 52w high, Q4 blowout (+27% PAT, 26.3% EBITDA margin best-in-class). Trailing SL up from 1405 to entry 1412.94 — locks breakeven on defensive winner. Target intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Only +0.7%, not yet +2% threshold for auto-trail to breakeven. Board meet Apr 27 with audited Q4 + potential fund raise is binary event risk. CASA slipped to 28.4%. Keeping SL at 1035 (1.3% below) which is tight given rich 4.37x P/B. Will reassess post-Apr27."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Position +1.0%, below 2% trail threshold. SL 675 sits at a reasonable support. Q4 results Apr 29 is binary event — 5 days out. Letting it run into earnings with SL just below entry."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Down 2.6%, under pressure today (-2.57%). SL 2260 is ~2% below CMP — respecting the original risk plan. Q4 results Apr 30 is the catalyst. If SL hits, exit cleanly."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Only -0.8%, SL 393 is ~2% below CMP — appropriate. Defensive PSU power, Q4 May 15. No change."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at 75 just under today's low. Let the stop work."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already above entry (breakeven+). No change needed today."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Hedge position, SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1412.94,
      "reasoning": "Trailing SL to entry — lock breakeven on a 52w-high defensive winner."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Below +2% trail threshold; Apr 27 binary event ahead. Existing tight SL stands."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Below +2% trail threshold; Apr 29 earnings binary."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Under pressure but SL 2260 respects original plan. Let it work."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Small loss, SL positioned correctly."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "HSCL — extended +23% in 4 sessions, parabolic; wait for pullback to 20DMA (~Rs 472) before considering. NAVINFLUOR — Q4 Apr 29 event, wait. GVT&D — stretched at 52w high with Supreme Court SLP overhang; skip. ONESOURCE — 38% promoter pledge is a hard disqualifier. DIVISLAB — constructive but no rush. Overall: binary earnings events next week for several names; capital preservation mode.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 68% deployed against 80% cap — room is limited (only 12% headroom). Held book skews toward rate-sensitive financials cluster (MAHABANK PSU bank + PNBHOUSING HFC + AUBANK SFB = ~30% of capital). No more financials. VIX up +3.5%, IT crash, weak tape — NOT an accumulation day. Only action today is trailing Nestle's SL to breakeven. Four binary earnings events (AUBANK Apr27, GRANULES Apr29, HINDUNILVR Apr30) in the next 6 sessions — event-risk awareness. Daily loss limit has INR 73k of remaining headroom; plenty of buffer."
}
